snapshot_source: General recreational limits compiled from state agency publications as of early 2025. Regulations change frequently — always verify with the official state source before fishing.

red_drum.notes: Slot limit: 18–27 in TL. Verify current rules before fishing.

spotted_seatrout.notes: Verify for any closed seasons or slot limits in effect.

southern_flounder.notes: Verify for seasonal closures; flounder regulations have been updated in recent years.

sheepshead.notes: Verify current limits with official source.

cobia.notes: Fork length minimum. Verify current rules before fishing.

california_halibut.notes: Possession limit is 10. Verify current rules with CDFW before fishing.

white_seabass.notes: Verify current size and bag limits with CDFW; rules may vary by region.

yellowtail.notes: Verify current bag limits and any area restrictions with CDFW.

kelp_bass.notes: Combined bass bag limit (kelp, sand, barred sand) may apply. Verify with CDFW.

sand_bass.notes: Combined bass bag limit (kelp, sand, barred sand) may apply. Verify with CDFW.

lingcod.season: Seasonal — check CDFW for current open dates
lingcod.notes: Season dates and bag limits vary by area (north vs. south). Verify before fishing.

corbina.notes: No state-regulated minimum size or bag limit. Hook and line only. Verify with CDFW.

cabezon.notes: Season and bag limits vary by CDFW management area. Verify current rules.

striped_bass.notes: Regulations may include slot limits or season closures. Verify with DEEP.

summer_flounder.notes: Minimum size varies annually; verify current year's limit with CT DEEP.

black_sea_bass.season: Seasonal — check CT DEEP for open dates
black_sea_bass.notes: Size and bag limits vary by season. Verify current rules before fishing.

bluefish.notes: Federal bag limit of 3/day applies. Verify current rules.

tautog.season: Seasonal — check CT DEEP for open dates
tautog.notes: Bag limit varies by season. Spring season is more restrictive. Verify with CT DEEP.

scup.notes: Verify current limits with CT DEEP.

striped_bass.notes: Regulations may include a slot limit. Verify current rules with DE DNREC.

summer_flounder.notes: Minimum size may change annually. Verify current rules with DE DNREC.

bluefish.notes: Verify current rules with DE DNREC.

black_sea_bass.notes: Verify current season dates and limits with DE DNREC.

red_drum.notes: Slot limit: 18–27 in TL inshore/nearshore; 18 in minimum offshore with 5/day limit. Rules vary by zone — verify with FWC.

spotted_seatrout.notes: Bag limit and size vary by zone (Northeast, East Central, Brevard, Southwest, etc.). Verify your zone's rules with FWC.

snook.season: Open season varies by zone — check FWC
snook.notes: Slot limit: 28–33 in TL. Season closed portions of year depending on Atlantic vs. Gulf side. Verify with FWC.

tarpon.notes: Most anglers practice catch and release. Harvest requires a $50 tarpon tag from FWC. Minimum 75 in fork length. Strongly encouraged to release.

cobia.notes: Fork length minimum. Verify current rules with FWC.

spanish_mackerel.notes: Fork length minimum. Verify current limits with FWC.

king_mackerel.notes: Fork length minimum. Bag limits may differ in federal vs. state waters. Verify with FWC.

gag_grouper.season: Seasonal — Gulf closed Jan–May; check FWC
gag_grouper.notes: Included in aggregate grouper bag limit. Season and limits vary Gulf vs. Atlantic. Verify with FWC.

red_snapper.season: Seasonal — limited season in both state and federal waters
red_snapper.notes: Season length and dates vary year to year. Verify current season with FWC before targeting red snapper.

pompano.notes: Fork length minimum. Verify current limits with FWC.

false_albacore.notes: Not subject to state size or bag limits. Verify with FWC.
